title: Ubiquiti UniFi AP U7 Pro XGS
description: The Ubiquiti U7 Pro XGS is a new WiFi 7 UniFi AP. It is a tri-band access point with a transmission speed of up to 5.8Gbps in the 6GHz band, up to 8.6Gbps in the 5GHz band, and up to 688Mbps in the 2.4GHz band, along with advanced encryption WPA3 . The U7-Pro-XGS is designed for WiFi coverage in your home, office, hotel spaces, or warehouse, supporting up to 500+ connected clients. Full roaming support ensures seamless handoff of connected clients between individual APs. For network connection,… Roaming â seamless transition between individual APs without interruptions Wireless uplink â ideal for locations where data cables cannot be brought Up to 8 SSIDs Detailed traffic statistics Guest network Load balancing â maintaining even load / switching clients Speed limitation for each SSID Device Ceiling mounting kit Screw set
